name: Automate Gym Lead Nurturing with Facebook Ads, WhatsApp & Google Sheets Tracking
description:
📌 What it does:

Captures leads from Facebook Ads

Sends instant WhatsApp to leads

Waits & checks for bookings

If booked anytime during 5-day nurturing, it stops the follow-ups and sends confirmations to both lead & gym owner

If not booked, continues to nurture daily for 5 days with reminders
